TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_O_teloc_no_riyar_ato_lotok—Pangcah, title = O_teloc_no_riyar_ato_lotok—Pangcah, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/O_teloc_no_riyar_ato_lotok—Pangcah} }

S.FORM: == O teloc no riyar ato lotok—Pangcah == O riyar ato lotok, o ka'oripan no Pangcah. O malalokay a tamdaw ko Pangcah. I lawacay no riyar ko 'orip a tamdaw i, mafana'ko fa'inayan a micelem, mifoting, mipacing, mi'afar, ato misalol i laloma'no nanom. O fafahian sato i, micekiw, misadipit, midamay i lawalawacan no riyar. Caay ka talaw cangra to 'orad ato fali. I lotokay ko 'orip a tamdaw i, mafana' ko fa'inayan a mi'adop. Adihay ko 'a'adopen itira, ira ko fafoy, o mangcel, o fohet, o malonem, o 'alem, ato miteker to masamaamaanay a ma^feray a 'ayam. O fafahian sato i, mafana' a midateng. Ira ko masamaamaanay a dating i lotolotokan. Ira ko dongec, o da'ci, o sokoy, o pahko, o lokot ato tatokem. Itini i niyaro', o safangcalay a kapah no Pangcah i, mafana'ay a mifoting, ato misaloma'. O limecedan a kaying i, malalok a matayal, mafana'a misacacak, ato inaneng a milosimet to laloma' no loma'. O matiniay a malalokay a wawa no Pangcah ko kakahemekan no finawlan.
S.PHON: == o~u təɾo~uʦ no~u rijar ato~u ɾo~uto~uk*paŋʦaħ == o~u rijar ato~u ɾo~uto~uk, o~u kaʡo~uripan no~u paŋʦaħ. o~u maɾaɾo~ukaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u paŋʦaħ. i ɾawaʦaj no~u rijar ko~u ʡo~urip a tamɬ~ɮaw i, mafanaʡko~u faʡinajan a miʦəɾəm, mifo~utiŋ, mipaʦiŋ, miʡafar, ato~u misaɾo~uɾ i ɾaɾo~umaʡno~u nano~um. o~u fafaħian sato~u i, miʦəkiw, misaɬ~ɮipit, miɬ~ɮamaj i ɾawaɾawaʦan no~u rijar. ʦaaj ka taɾaw ʦaŋra to~u ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ ato~u faɾi. i ɾo~uto~ukaj ko~u ʡo~urip a tamɬ~ɮaw i, mafanaʡ ko~u faʡinajan a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up. aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən itira, ira ko~u fafo~uj, o~u maŋʦəɾ, o~u fo~uħət, o~u maɾo~unəm, o~u ʡaɾəm, ato~u mitəkər to~u masamaamaanaj a maʔfəraj a ʡajam. o~u fafaħian sato~u i, mafanaʡ a miɬ~ɮatəŋ. ira ko~u masamaamaanaj a ɬ~ɮatiŋ i ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan. ira ko~u ɬ~ɮo~uŋəʦ, o~u ɬ~ɮaʡʦi, o~u so~uko~uj, o~u paħko~u, o~u ɾo~uko~ut ato~u tato~ukəm. itini i nijaro~uʡ, o~u safaŋʦaɾaj a kapaħ no~u paŋʦaħ i, mafanaʡaj a mifo~utiŋ, ato~u misaɾo~umaʡ. o~u ɾiməʦəɬ~ɮan a kajiŋ i, maɾaɾo~uk a matajaɾ, mafanaʡa misaʦaʦak, ato~u inanəŋ a miɾo~usimət to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u ɾo~umaʡ. o~u matiniaj a maɾaɾo~ukaj a wawa no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u kakaħəməkan no~u finawɾan.
S.FORM: == O teloc no riyar ato lotok—Pangcah == O riyar ato lotok, o ka'oripan no Pangcah. O malalokay a tamdaw ko Pangcah. I lawacay no riyar ko 'orip a tamdaw i, mafana'ko fa'inayan a micelem, mifoting, mipacing, mi'afar, ato misalol i laloma'no nanom. O fafahian sato i, micekiw, misadipit, midamay i lawalawacan no riyar. Caay ka talaw cangra to 'orad ato fali. I lotokay ko 'orip a tamdaw i, mafana' ko fa'inayan a mi'adop. Adihay ko 'a'adopen itira, ira ko fafoy, o mangcel, o fohet, o malonem, o 'alem, ato miteker to masamaamaanay a ma^feray a 'ayam. O fafahian sato i, mafana' a midateng. Ira ko masamaamaanay a dating i lotolotokan. Ira ko dongec, o da'ci, o sokoy, o pahko, o lokot ato tatokem. Itini i niyaro', o safangcalay a kapah no Pangcah i, mafana'ay a mifoting, ato misaloma'. O limecedan a kaying i, malalok a matayal, mafana'a misacacak, ato inaneng a milosimet to laloma' no loma'. O matiniay a malalokay a wawa no Pangcah ko kakahemekan no finawlan.
S.PHON: == o~u təɾo~uʦ no~u rijar ato~u ɾo~uto~uk*paŋʦaħ == o~u rijar ato~u ɾo~uto~uk, o~u kaʡo~uripan no~u paŋʦaħ. o~u maɾaɾo~ukaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u paŋʦaħ. i ɾawaʦaj no~u rijar ko~u ʡo~urip a tamɬ~ɮaw i, mafanaʡko~u faʡinajan a miʦəɾəm, mifo~utiŋ, mipaʦiŋ, miʡafar, ato~u misaɾo~uɾ i ɾaɾo~umaʡno~u nano~um. o~u fafaħian sato~u i, miʦəkiw, misaɬ~ɮipit, miɬ~ɮamaj i ɾawaɾawaʦan no~u rijar. ʦaaj ka taɾaw ʦaŋra to~u ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ ato~u faɾi. i ɾo~uto~ukaj ko~u ʡo~urip a tamɬ~ɮaw i, mafanaʡ ko~u faʡinajan a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up. aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən itira, ira ko~u fafo~uj, o~u maŋʦəɾ, o~u fo~uħət, o~u maɾo~unəm, o~u ʡaɾəm, ato~u mitəkər to~u masamaamaanaj a maʔfəraj a ʡajam. o~u fafaħian sato~u i, mafanaʡ a miɬ~ɮatəŋ. ira ko~u masamaamaanaj a ɬ~ɮatiŋ i ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan. ira ko~u ɬ~ɮo~uŋəʦ, o~u ɬ~ɮaʡʦi, o~u so~uko~uj, o~u paħko~u, o~u ɾo~uko~ut ato~u tato~ukəm. itini i nijaro~uʡ, o~u safaŋʦaɾaj a kapaħ no~u paŋʦaħ i, mafanaʡaj a mifo~utiŋ, ato~u misaɾo~umaʡ. o~u ɾiməʦəɬ~ɮan a kajiŋ i, maɾaɾo~uk a matajaɾ, mafanaʡa misaʦaʦak, ato~u inanəŋ a miɾo~usimət to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u ɾo~umaʡ. o~u matiniaj a maɾaɾo~ukaj a wawa no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u kakaħəməkan no~u finawɾan.
